zh.lifeSummary: 當David Collins於1362年出生在蘇格蘭度福利爾托瓦爾德時，他的父親Andrew Collins24歲，母親Mary22歲。他於1395年與Sarah Finley在英國米德萊可倫敦結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1410年在英國米德萊可倫敦享年48歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当David Collins于1362年出生在苏格兰度福利爾托瓦爾德时，他的父亲Andrew Collins24岁，母亲Mary22岁。他于1395年与Sarah Finley在英国米德萊可倫敦结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1410年在英国米德萊可倫敦享年48岁。

nameMeanings.name: Collins
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Colin , with genitival or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish and Manx: shortened Anglicized from Ó Coileáin, compare Cullen , or in Man or west Ulster shortened from Mac Coileáin, compare McQuillan and McCallion . The genitival -s is a local addition to Collin and variants after the surname was Anglicized.
Americanized form of French   Colin   or   Collin   and also   Collette  .

variants.name: Colin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Alfredo, Francisco, Jesus, Ricardo, Alberto, Angel, Arturo, Eduardo, Esteban, Faustino.  French Alexandre, Andre, Armand, Georges, Henri, Jean Claude, Jean-Michel, Laurette, Lucien, Marcel, Patrice, Pierre.
French, Walloon, and Breton: from a French shortened pet form of the personal name   Nicolas   (see   Nicholas  ). This surname is also found in the Flemish part of Belgium.
English: from the personal name Colin, a diminutive of Col, itself a pet form of Nicholas .

variants.name: Kolenc
meanings: nickname from the dialect plant name kolenc ‘yellow bedstraw (Galium verum)’ or ‘common nipplewort (Lapsana communis)’. Compare Collins 3.

variants.name: Collings
meanings: English: variant of Collins or Colling , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: David
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the greatest of all the kings of Israel, whose history is recounted with great vividness in the first and second books of Samuel and elsewhere. As a boy he killed the giant Philistine Goliath with his slingshot. As king of Judah, and later of all Israel, he expanded the power of the Israelites and established the security of their kingdom. He was also noted as a poet, many of the Psalms being attributed to him. The Hebrew derivation of the name is uncertain; it is said by some to represent a nursery word meaning ‘darling’. It is a very popular Jewish name, but is almost equally common among Gentiles in the English-speaking world. It is particularly common in Wales and Scotland, having been borne by the patron saint of Wales (  see  Dewi   ) and by two medieval kings of Scotland.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When David Collins was born in 1362, in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, his father, Andrew Collins, was 24 and his mother, Mary, was 22. He married Sarah Finley in 1395, in London, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1410, in London, Middlesex, England, at the age of 48.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque David Collins est né en 1362, à Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, son père, Andrew Collins, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mary, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Finley en 1395, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1410, à Londres, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 48 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als David Collins 1362 in Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Andrew Collins 24 und seine Mutter Mary 22. Er hat 1395 in London, Middlesex, England Sarah Finley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1410 im Alter von 48 Jahren in London, Middlesex, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando David Collins è nato il nel 1362 nel Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Andrew Collins, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Mary, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Finley nel 1395, nel London, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1410, nel London, Middlesex, England, all'età di 48 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: David Collinsが1362年にスコットランドダムフリーシュアイアトルソルワルドで生まれた時，父Andrew Collinsは24歳，母Maryは22歳であった。1395年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンでSarah Finleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1410年にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドンで48歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: David Collins(이)가 1362년 스컷랜드 드프리실르 토르토월드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Andrew Collins(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1395년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 Sarah Finley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1410년 영국 미들레세스 런던에서 48세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando David Collins nasceu em 1362, em Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, seu pai, Andrew Collins, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mary, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Finley em 1395, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1410, em London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 48 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда David Collins родился в 1362 г. в местности тортаурвалд, думфриессхир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Andrew Collins было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mary, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Finley в 1395 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1410 г. в местности Лондон, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 48 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando David Collins nació en 1362, en Torthorwald, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, su papá, Andrew Collins, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mary, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Sarah Finley en 1395, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1410, en London, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 48 años.
